clusters.name: Inclusiveness
clusters.primary_cluster: Accessibility & inclusion / inclusivity and gender neutrality

clusters.name: Accuracy, efficacy and reliability
clusters.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability

clusters.name: Content quality assessment
clusters.primary_cluster: Generic content quality check / content quality

clusters.name: Answer engine optimization
clusters.primary_cluster: Online findability & visibility / answer engine optimization

kpis.name: Diversity
kpis.primary_cluster: Accessibility & inclusion / inclusivity and gender neutrality
kpis.contribution: Inclusive content through balanced representation of customer groups and contexts
kpis.norm: diversity in (images of) customer contexts; counterstereotypes
kpis.measurement: degree of balance in representation of customer groups and contexts in content (collection)
kpis.indicator_phrase: very low, low, medium, high, very high

kpis.name: Gender neutrality
kpis.primary_cluster: Accessibility & inclusion / inclusivity and gender neutrality
kpis.contribution: Inclusive content through gender neutral or female language
kpis.norm: gender-neutral words and forms of address; words with a neutral or feminine connotation
kpis.measurement: gender characterization of used forms of address and vocabulary

kpis.name: Stereotypes and discrimination
kpis.primary_cluster: Accessibility & inclusion / inclusivity and gender neutrality
kpis.contribution: Inclusive content by avoidance of stereotypes and discrimination
kpis.measurement: stereotypes and/or discrimination in content

kpis.name: Content audience fit
kpis.contribution: Readable content through appropriate content(variants) for (knowledge) level of audiences
kpis.norm: It is better to inform a smaller target group correctly than to inform a larger target group incorrectly.
kpis.measurement: fit of content for (knowledge) level of specific audience(s)
kpis.indicator_phrase: no fit, limited fit, optimal fit

kpis.name: Paragraph/Bubble - number of words/sentences
kpis.contribution: Readable content by application of right length of paragraphs for set reading level
kpis.norm_chat: max. 160 characters per bubble / 10-12 words per sentence / max 3 bubbles
kpis.measurement: length of paragraphs in words related to norm for set reading level

kpis.name: Reading level
kpis.contribution: Readable content by application of B1/lower language levels
kpis.measurement: applied language level in content

kpis.name: Reading time
kpis.contribution: Readable content by application of norms for reading time per content type
kpis.norm: to define by channel. Note: people read an average of 200-300 words per minute; dependency on individual speed and complexity of content.
kpis.measurement: required time to digest content

kpis.name: Sentence - number of words
kpis.contribution: Readable content by application of right and varying length of sentences for set reading level
kpis.norm: min. 5 words, max. 20 words/B1: max. 15 words; variation in length
kpis.measurement: (variation in) length of sentences in words related to norm for set reading level
kpis.indicator_phrase: right length, too long; variation, no variation

kpis.name: Sentence - structure
kpis.contribution: Readable content by avoidance of complex sentence structure for set reading level
kpis.measurement: complex sentence structure in content related to norm for set reading level (e.g. auxiliary verbs, tang construction, double negatives)

kpis.name: Story structure
kpis.contribution: Readable content by application of a clear story structure in text
kpis.measurement: clear story structure in text (e.g. goal in first sentences, 1 subject per paragraph)

kpis.name: Text - number of sentences
kpis.contribution: Readable content through application of right text length for set reading level
kpis.measurement: length of text in sentences related to norm for set reading level

kpis.name: Word difficulty
kpis.contribution: Readable content through application of right level of complexity of words for set reading level
kpis.norm: B1:  everyday, high frequency words. https://www.zoekeenvoudigewoorden.nl/
kpis.measurement: complexity level of words in content related to norm for set reading level
kpis.indicator_phrase: within limits, too many difficult words

kpis.name: Bullet list - format
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by avoidance of malformatted bullet point lists
kpis.norm: bullet point lists always in HTML format
kpis.measurement: malformatted bullet lists in content

kpis.name: Bullet list - points
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by correct application of bullet point lists
kpis.norm: min. 3 - max. 6 points in bullet list
kpis.measurement: bullet point lists in content related to norm
kpis.automated_match: limited match (no norm for number of items)

kpis.name: Documents
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by application of accessible documents (PFD or Word)
kpis.norm: readable documents for assistive technology (e.g. screen readers)
kpis.measurement: accessibility issues in PDF or Word document for assistive technology (e.g. no readable index, no marked headers)

kpis.name: Error messages
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by application of clear error messages
kpis.norm: all  error messages indicate that an error has occurred and required correction by user
kpis.measurement: indication of error type and required correction from user in error messages

kpis.name: Forms
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by application of clear forms
kpis.norm: min. clear input fields, instructions in helptexts, error messages
kpis.measurement: clarity of input entries, instructions, helptexts, error messages in form
kpis.indicator_phrase: unclear, somewhat clear, clear, very clear

kpis.name: Headers and titles
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by application of scannable headers and titles
kpis.measurement: non scannable headers and titles

kpis.name: Images with missing alt text
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by avoidance of images without alt text
kpis.norm: obligatory alt tag in case of informative image
kpis.measurement: images with missing alt text

kpis.name: Links - application & format
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through consistent application links and clear link texts
kpis.norm: description of link target content af front of link text
kpis.measurement: unwanted application or naming of links

kpis.name: Navigation
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by application of clear navigation
kpis.norm: clear and visible tree structure; as little clicks as possible
kpis.measurement: clarity of navigation
kpis.indicator_phrase: unclear, somewhat clear, clear, very clear

kpis.name: Styling
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by avoidance of manual styling of text
kpis.norm: CMS styling of content elements (e.g. headers or 'let op') only
kpis.measurement: manual bold, italic or underlined text styling

kpis.name: Tables
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by application of accessible tables
kpis.norm: readable tables for assistive technology (e.g. screen readers)
kpis.measurement: accessibility issues in tables for assistive technology (e.g. no marked headers, colour indication without explaning text)

kpis.name: Video captions
kpis.contribution: Accessible content by avoidance of videos without (audio)description and subtitles
kpis.norm: obligatory caption (exception: supporting video content without new information) in language used in video
kpis.measurement: videos without (audio)description and/or subtitles in language used in video

kpis.name: Clarity
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Accurate, effective and reliable content through clear substance
kpis.measurement: degree of clear substance in content
kpis.indicator_phrase: many ambiguities, few ambiguities, no ambiguities

kpis.name: Completeness (source)
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Accurate, effective and reliable content through inclusion of all relevant substance from knowledge source
kpis.norm_chat: includes all relevant information from the provided context (knowledge base)
kpis.measurement: degree of substantial coverage of relevant knowledge from GenAI source by generated content
kpis.indicator_phrase: very incomplete, incomplete, fairly complete, mostly complete, fully complete

kpis.name: Customization
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Accurate, effective and reliable content through (options for) customization by user
kpis.measurement: options for customization/modification of content by users to meet their preferences (e.g. decision tree)
kpis.indicator_phrase: no options, limited options, many options

kpis.name: Factuality & truthfullness
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Accurate, effective and reliable content through correct substance without deception
kpis.norm_chat: no factual errors and reliable response
kpis.measurement: count of substantial errors in (generated) content
kpis.indicator_phrase: numerous errors, several errors, moderate errors, few errors, no errors

kpis.name: Groundedness (source)
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Accurate, effective and reliable content through demonstrable foundation on knowledge source (groundedness)
kpis.measurement: degree of foundation of generated content on GenAI knowledge source
kpis.indicator_phrase: no grounding, limited grounding, reasonable grounding, fully grounded

kpis.name: Human expert check (substance)
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: (GenAI source) content that is checked and approved  by expert on substance before publication or generation
kpis.measurement: check and approval by information owner and/or other expert (step in dCLP)

kpis.name: (Hyper)personalization
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Accurate, effective and reliable content through alignment with customer data and preferences
kpis.norm: valuable and personal content; transparency about data usage; guiding without being creepy

kpis.name: Relevancy
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Accurate, effective and reliable content through relevant substance only for user
kpis.norm_chat: Answer addresses the main subject or context of the conversation
kpis.measurement: degree of relevancy of content or user
kpis.indicator_phrase: off-topic, somewhat relevant, reasonable relevant, highly relevant

kpis.name: Truthfullness
kpis.primary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Accurate, effective and reliable content through truthfull substance only/no deception
kpis.norm_chat: no factual errors and reliable response
kpis.measurement: count of deviations froms standards for truthfull substance in content (e.g, usage of term advisor/advice in case of execution-only)
kpis.indicator_phrase: many deviations, few deviations, no deviations

kpis.name: Human expert check (compliancy & legal)
kpis.contribution: (GenAI source) content that is checked by a Product owner and Legal and Compliance expert before publication or generation
kpis.measurement: check and approval by a Product Owner and Legal and Compliance expert (step in dCLP)

kpis.name: Privacy and security
kpis.contribution: Content that complies with relevant laws & regulations for privacy and security policies
kpis.norm: lawfull use of personal data; links to AAB open domain sites only
kpis.norm_chat: no special or sensitive personal information; links to AAB open domain sites only; no attachments in chat
kpis.norm_messages: no special or sensitive personal information; links to AAB open domain sites only; no attachments in e-mail
kpis.measurement: count of deviations froms standards following from laws and regulations fo content (type) (e.g, investment or payment products)
kpis.indicator_phrase: many deviations, few deviations, no deviations

kpis.name: Content management team
kpis.contribution: Well managed (GenAI source) content based on identifiable SPOC for Content management
kpis.measurement: content management team tag in content

kpis.name: Information owner
kpis.contribution: Well managed (GenAI source) content based on identifiable SPOC for substance (information owner)
kpis.measurement: information owner tag in content

kpis.name: Phase of content in dCLP
kpis.contribution: Well managed (GenAI source) content based on insight in phase in digital content life cycle process (dCLP)
kpis.measurement: dCLP tag in content

kpis.name: Last modified
kpis.contribution: Well managed (GenAI source) content based on insight in topicality
kpis.measurement: number of days between modification date and actual date related to norm for information type and knowledge type

kpis.name: Status of evaluation
kpis.contribution: Well managed (GenAI source) content based on insight in status of evaluation/periodical check
kpis.norm: all content is evaluated each 12 months.
kpis.measurement: evaluation/periodical check and approval of content within the set period (step in dCLP)

kpis.name: Status of publication
kpis.contribution: Well managed (GenAI source) content based on insight in publication status of content/need for clean-up
kpis.measurement: publication status tag in content

kpis.name: Status of utilisation
kpis.contribution: Well managed (GenAI source) content based on insight in actual utilisation of content item (e.g. download or link) in publication(s)/need for clean-up
kpis.measurement: utilisation status tag in content

kpis.name: Tracability
kpis.contribution: Well managed (GenAI source) content based on insight in source and applicable version
kpis.norm: obligatory for all GenAI source content
kpis.measurement: source ID and version tag in content

kpis.name: Approved source content for GenAI
kpis.secondary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on approval for GenAI application
kpis.norm: all GenAI source content which is not allowed for GenAI application has an exclusion tag
kpis.measurement: exclusion of source content for GenAI tag in content

kpis.name: Audience
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on customer type
kpis.measurement: audience tag in content
kpis.indicator_phrase: e.g. consumer clients, affluent clients, business clients

kpis.name: Business line
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on business line
kpis.measurement: business line tag in content
kpis.indicator_phrase: Corporate Banking, Personal & Business Banking, Wealth Management

kpis.name: Business goal
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on business goal
kpis.measurement: business goal tag in content

kpis.name: Channel
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on channel type
kpis.measurement: channel tag in content
kpis.indicator_phrase: e.g. chat, e-mail, internal or external website

kpis.name: Content type
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on content type
kpis.measurement: content type tag in content

kpis.name: Knowledge type
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on knowledge type
kpis.measurement: knowledge type tag in content
kpis.indicator_phrase: e.g. contact information, instructional answer, product feature

kpis.name: Language
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on used language
kpis.measurement: language tag in content

kpis.name: Life event
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on life event of customer
kpis.measurement: life event tag in content
kpis.indicator_phrase: e.g. being born, starting first job, passing away

kpis.name: Process category
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on process category
kpis.measurement: process category tag in content

kpis.name: Product category
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on product category type
kpis.measurement: product category tag in content

kpis.name: Product group
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on product group type
kpis.measurement: product group tag in content
kpis.indicator_phrase: e.g. cancellation insurance, car insurance, home insurance

kpis.name: Role
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on role type
kpis.measurement: role tag in content

kpis.name: Sector
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on relevance for sector
kpis.measurement: sector tag in content

kpis.name: Season/time
kpis.contribution: Identification, findability and clustering of (GenAI source) content based on season/time
kpis.measurement: season/time tag in content
kpis.indicator_phrase: e.g. end of year, tax return

kpis.name: Content type model
kpis.contribution: Modular and consistently structured (GenAI source) content based on semantic models or content types
kpis.norm: all content meets mandatory parts of model
kpis.measurement: usage of standard template for content type (e.g. article, FAQ, dialogue)

kpis.name: Knowledge type model
kpis.contribution: Modular and consistently structured (GenAI source) content based on semantic, publication independent models for knowledge types
kpis.norm: all knowledge meets mandatory parts of model
kpis.measurement: usage of standard template for knowledge type (e.g. contact information, instructional answer, product feature)

kpis.name: Modularity and reusage
kpis.contribution: Modularly managed (GenAI source) content with options for (cross-publication) reuse
kpis.measurement: degree of modularity and options for reuse in (GenAI source) content
kpis.indicator_phrase: very low, low, medium, high, very high

kpis.name: Customer Effort Score (CES)
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on customer feedback about the effort required to get an issue resolved, a request fulfilled or a question answered
kpis.measurement: average score from customer on a 5-point CES scale related to norm
kpis.indicator_phrase: 1 very difficult, 2 difficult, 3 neutral, 4 easy, 5 very easy

kpis.name: Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT)
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on customer feedback about satisfaction with the experience, product or service
kpis.measurement: average score from customer on a 5-point CSS scale related to norm
kpis.indicator_phrase: 1 very dissatisfied, 2 dissatisfied, 3 neutral, 4 satisfied, 5 very satisfied related to norm

kpis.name: Customer votes
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on customer votes on content
kpis.measurement: percentage of negative (thumbs down) and positive (thumbs up) customer votes on content related to norm

kpis.name: Feedback type
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on categorisation of textual feedback on content
kpis.measurement: count of textual feedbacks based on type
kpis.indicator_phrase: clash with vision, compliment, frustration, pain point, preference, suggestion

kpis.name: Goal completion/resolveness
kpis.secondary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on (customer satisfaction about) completion of goals (e.g. finishing end point with confirmed usefulness)
kpis.measurement: size of content considered as resolved (e.g. number of resolved conversations)

kpis.name: Goal completion/resolveness rate
kpis.secondary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on degree of (customer satisfaction about) completion of goals (e.g. finishing end point with confirmed usefulness)
kpis.measurement: percentage of content considered as resolved (e.g. percentage of resolved conversations)

kpis.name: Net Promoter Score (jNPS/tNPS)
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on customer user experience after completing a journey or after contacting the bank
kpis.measurement: average score from customer on a 10-point NPS scale related to norm
kpis.indicator_phrase: 0 being not likely at all - 10 very likely to refer

kpis.name: Usefulness rate
kpis.secondary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on customer feedback about the usefulness of the content
kpis.measurement: percentage of content marked as usefull by customers

kpis.name: Usefulness response rate
kpis.secondary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Improving content based on customer response on question about the usefulness of the content
kpis.measurement: percentage of users' responses to usefulness question

kpis.name: Content quality score
kpis.primary_cluster: Generic content quality check / content quality
kpis.contribution: Content audit based on weighted language and accessibility KPIs
kpis.measurement: score of content based  on weighted language and accessibility KPIs

kpis.name: Human expert check (content)
kpis.primary_cluster: Generic content quality check / content quality
kpis.contribution: (GenAI source) content that is checked by (second) expert on content quality before publication or generation
kpis.measurement: check and approval by (second) content specialist (step in dCLP)

kpis.name: Guardrails hit
kpis.contribution: Safeguarding and improving GenAI input and output through insight in various types of input and output guardrails
kpis.measurement: ranking of numbers of applied guardrail input and output types
kpis.indicator_phrase: count of input guardrails types and output guardrail types

kpis.name: Guardrails hit rate
kpis.contribution: Safeguarding and improving GenAI input and output through insight in coverage of content by input and output guardrails
kpis.measurement: percentage of content that is hit by guardrails

kpis.name: Guardrail type hit
kpis.contribution: Safeguarding and improving GenAI input and output through insight in balance between input and output guardrails
kpis.measurement: percentage of content that is hit by input guardrails and by output guardails

kpis.name: Input guardrails hit
kpis.contribution: Safeguarding and improving GenAI input through insight in volume of guardrail types targeting content before it hits the LLM
kpis.measurement: number of applied input guardrail types over time

kpis.name: Output guardrails hit
kpis.contribution: Safeguarding and improving GenAI output through insight in volume of guardrail types controlling the response of the LLM
kpis.measurement: number of applied output guardrail types over time

kpis.name: Responsiveness
kpis.contribution: Safeguarding and improving GenAI input and output through insight in volume of generated content with positive business outcome
kpis.measurement: volume of positive outcomes of generated content (e.g. generation of answer on question)

kpis.name: Responsiveness rate
kpis.contribution: Safeguarding and improving GenAI input and output through insight in percentage of generated content with positive business outcome
kpis.measurement: rate of positive outcomes of generated content t (e.g. generation of answer on question)

kpis.name: Spelling - Abbreviations
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content by using only necessary abbreviations and in the correct way
kpis.measurement: unwanted or incorrect abbreviations in content based on guidelines

kpis.name: Spelling - Amounts
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through correct spelling of amounts
kpis.norm: see norms in  (additional guidelines on) Schrijfwijzer ('Bedragen' en 'Euro')
kpis.measurement: incorrect spelling of amounts in content based on guidelines

kpis.name: Spelling - Articles
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through correct usage of articles with banknames
kpis.measurement: incorrect usage of articles with banknames in content based on guidelines

kpis.name: Spelling - British
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through the use of British spelling
kpis.measurement: incorrect usage of English spellingin content based on guidelines

kpis.name: Spelling - Capitals
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through correct usage of capitals
kpis.measurement: incorrect usage of capitals in content based on guidelines

kpis.name: Spelling - Numbers
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through correct spelling of numbers
kpis.norm: see norms in (additional guidelines on) Schrijfwijzer ('Cijfers en getallen', 'Bankrekeningnummers', 'Telefoonnummers')
kpis.measurement: incorrect spelling of numbers in content based on guidelines

kpis.name: Spelling - Punctuation & special characters
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through correct usage of punctuation and special characters
kpis.norm: see norms in  (additional guidelines on) Schrijfwijzer ('Aanhalingstekens', Accenttekens', 'En-teken', 'Leestekens', 'Percentages')
kpis.measurement: incorrect usage of punctuation in content based on guidelines

kpis.name: Spelling - Thousands
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through correct spelling of thousands
kpis.norm: see norms in (additional guidelines on) Schrijfwijzer ('Cijfers en getallen'')
kpis.measurement: incorrect spelling of thousands in content based on guidelines

kpis.name: Brand experience
kpis.contribution: Branded content by offering an inseparable ABN AMRO experience
kpis.norm: 8 out of 10 checked off checks on Brand Experience checklist
kpis.measurement: check off of 10 checks on Brand Experience checklist

kpis.name: Jargon
kpis.contribution: Branded content by avoidance of jargon
kpis.measurement: technical language and outdated of formal words in content

kpis.name: Old-fashioned language
kpis.contribution: Branded content by avoidance of outdated or formal words
kpis.measurement: technical language and outdated of formal words in content

kpis.name: Salutation
kpis.contribution: Branded content by application of correct salutation
kpis.norm_messages: see norms per client type in 'Aanhef in berichten'
kpis.measurement: incorrect salutation in content

kpis.name: Sentiment level
kpis.contribution: Branded content by application of words with a positive or neutral sentiment level
kpis.measurement: sentiment of word usage in content

kpis.name: Tone of voice
kpis.contribution: Branded content by application of correct tone of voice
kpis.measurement: positioning of content on brand voice benchmark levels

kpis.name: Banking terminology
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through standardized banking terms and names
kpis.norm: standard terms in case of bank names, processes and products
kpis.measurement: deviations from standardized banking terms and names

kpis.name: Translations
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through the use of natural language in translations
kpis.measurement: unnatural language in translated content

kpis.name: Word usage
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through consistent and clear word usage
kpis.norm: see norms for clear word jusage in Schrijfwijzer/Regels voor woorden
kpis.measurement: deviations from rules for clear word usage (e.g. no  ambiguous words, figurative language)

kpis.name: Writing style- active
kpis.contribution: Well written and consistent content through the use of an active writing style
kpis.measurement: inactive sentences or noun style

kpis.name: Answer explanatory content
kpis.primary_cluster: Online findability & visibility / answer engine optimization
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through answer explanatory content (practical examples, images, step-by-step plans)
kpis.measurement: presence of answer explanatory content (practical examples, images, step-by-step plans)

kpis.name: Comprehensiveness (answer)
kpis.primary_cluster: Online findability & visibility / answer engine optimization
kpis.secondary_cluster: Compliancy  & substantive quality / accuracy, efficacy & reliability
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through comprehensive content that answers entire user query
kpis.measurement: check of comprehensiveness of content related to user query/intent
kpis.indicator_phrase: very incomplete, incomplete, fairly complete, mostly complete, fully complete

kpis.name: Question/answer structure in content
kpis.primary_cluster: Online findability & visibility / answer engine optimization
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through question/answer structure in content
kpis.norm: obligatory in case of customer questions about knowledge
kpis.measurement: question/answer structure in content

kpis.name: Writing style - conversational
kpis.primary_cluster: Online findability & visibility / answer engine optimization
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through conversational writing style in content
kpis.measurement: conversational writing style in content

kpis.name: H1 header - number of words
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of words in H1 headers
kpis.measurement: applied number of words in H1 header related to norm

kpis.name: Images - number of characters in alttags
kpis.contribution: number of characters in alttags of images
kpis.measurement: applied number of characters in alttag related to norm

kpis.name: Meta description - number of characters
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of characters in meta descriptions
kpis.measurement: applied number of characters in meta description related to norm

kpis.name: Meta description - number of words
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of words in metadescriptions
kpis.measurement: applied number of words in meta description related to norm

kpis.name: Text - number of words
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of words in body content
kpis.measurement: applied number of words in text related to norm

kpis.name: Title - number of characters
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of characters in browser titles
kpis.measurement: applied number of characters in title related to norm

kpis.name: Title - number of words
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of words in browser titles
kpis.measurement: applied number of words in title related to norm

kpis.name: URL - length
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of maximum length of URLs
kpis.measurement: applied length of URL versus norm

kpis.name: H1 header - presence
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of H1-header in content
kpis.measurement: presence of H1 header in content

kpis.name: H2-6 headers - number
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of H2-H6 headers in content
kpis.measurement: applied number of H2-H6 headers related to norm

kpis.name: Images - number
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of images in content
kpis.measurement: applied number of images related to norm

kpis.name: Title - presence
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of browser title in content
kpis.measurement: presence of browser title in content

kpis.name: URL - composition
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through avoidance of unwanted characters in URLs
kpis.norm:
47 / 5,000
no numbers, special characters, or underscores in URL
kpis.measurement: unwanted characters in URL

kpis.name: Body content - uniqueness
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through unique body content
kpis.measurement: duplicates in body content in content collection

kpis.name: Experience & expertise
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content content through demonstrable experience and expertise
kpis.measurement: presence of demonstrable customer experience and expertise

kpis.name: Meta description - uniqueness
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through unique meta descriptions
kpis.measurement: duplicates in meta descriptions in content collection

kpis.name: Referrals
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through referrals to content
kpis.measurement: references from other content in content collection

kpis.name: Title - uniqueness
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through unique browser titles
kpis.measurement: duplicates in titles in content collection

kpis.name: Body content - key word density
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum key word density in body content
kpis.norm: min. 1 keyword for 100-199 words; 2 keywords for 200-1499 words; 3 keywords for ≥ 1500 words
kpis.measurement: applied key word density in body content related to norm for number of words

kpis.name: Body content - key words in first words
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of key words in first 50 words of body content
kpis.measurement: application of main key word in first 50 words of text

kpis.name: H1 header - keywords
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of (unique) keywords in H1 headers
kpis.measurement: applied number of (unique) keywords in H1 header related to norm

kpis.name: H2-H6 headers - keywords
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of (unique) keywords in H2-H6 headers
kpis.measurement: applied number of (unique) keywords in H2-6 headers related to norm

kpis.name: Images - keywords in alltag
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of (unique) keywords in alttags of images
kpis.measurement: applied number of (unique) keywords in alttags of images related to norm

kpis.name: Images & downloads - keywords in filename
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of (unique) keywords in filenames of  images and downloads
kpis.measurement: applied number of (unique) keywords in filenames of images and downloads

kpis.name: Meta description - keywords
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of (unique) keywords in meta descriptions
kpis.measurement: applied number of (unique) keywords in meta description related to norm

kpis.name: Title - keywords
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of a minimum and maximum number of (unique) keywords in browser titles
kpis.measurement: applied number of (unique) keywords in browser title related to norm

kpis.name: URL - keywords
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of a minimum and maximum number of (unique) keywords in URLs
kpis.measurement: applied number of (unique) keywords in URL related to norm

kpis.name: Images - broken images
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content by avoiding broken images
kpis.measurement: broken images (images not loading) in content

kpis.name: Links - broken links
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content by avoiding broken links
kpis.measurement: broken links (defect links) in content

kpis.name: Links - number of external links
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of external links in content
kpis.measurement: applied number of external links related to norm

kpis.name: Links - number of internal links
kpis.contribution: Easily findable and highly visible content through application of minimum and maximum number of internal links in content
kpis.measurement: applied number of internal inks related to norm

kpis.name: No paraphrased content
kpis.contribution: Easily findable, GenAI-rater-style quality: no paraphrase, no filler.
